title: Repository Summary
text: This repository contains 166 scanned files with 1498 detected symbols across 25 modules. Detected stack: languages JSON, JavaScript, Markdown, Python, TOML, TypeScript, YAML, frameworks none, package managers npm. Primary entrypoints: src/cli/index.ts, src/mcp/server.ts. Common commands: npm run dev, npm run build, npm run lint, npm run test.
